/usr/bin/ar qc ../../lib/libpcre.a CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_byte_order.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_chartables.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_compile.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_config.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_dfa_exec.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_exec.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_fullinfo.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_get.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_globals.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_jit_compile.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_maketables.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_newline.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_ord2utf16.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_refcount.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_string_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_study.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_tables.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_ucd.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_utf16_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_valid_utf16.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_version.c.o CMakeFiles/pcre.dir/pcre16_xclass.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../lib/libpcre.a
